about.title: Didap, in two lines.
about.intro: We're a small, independent, stubborn studio.
about.body_1: We sit at the intersection of design and technology to build digital products that feel handcrafted.
about.body_2: Every project is a chance to learn something new — and to never repeat ourselves.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.intro: If you have a project in mind, write to us. We answer everyone — even just to say no.
